---
categories:
- "Grau: Professor Substituto"
- "Área: Combinatória Infinita"
- "Local: PR"
title: Gustavo Henrique Labegalini Boska
---

Use of the functorialization of end-spaces and edge end-spaces to extend results
of finite combinatorics into an infinite setting. Study of combinatorial
representation of continuous maps under such functors. Finding interesting
categories and invariants under these constructions.

## Instituição

Universidade Tecnológica Federal do Paraná (UTFPR) - Curitiba.

## Currículo Lattes

<https://lattes.cnpq.br/9858968452979652>
